query:
SELECT 
  pa.userId,
  u.name,
  COUNT(pa.id) AS totalAttempts,
  SUM(pa.isCorrect) AS correct,
  MAX(pa.completedAt) AS lastAttempt
FROM puzzle_attempts pa
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = pa.userId
GROUP BY pa.userId, u.name
ORDER BY lastAttempt DESC
LIMIT 20;
